chapter_title.en: True meaning of istighfār in Islam

text: وَالسَّادِسُ: أَنْ تُذِيقَ الْجِسْمَ أَلَمَ الطَّاعَةِ كَمَا أَذَقْتَهُ حَلاَوَةَ الْمَعْصِيَةِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: and the sixth is to make the body taste the pain of obedience as you (previously) made it taste the sweetness of disobedience.
